candidate_definitions.text: SearXNG is a free internet metasearch engine which aggregates results from various search services and databases. Users are neither tracked nor profiled.
A simple, fast and user-friendly alternative to 'find'
Fess is very powerful and easily deployable Enterprise Search Server.

Up to 100x faster strings for C, C++, CUDA, Python, Rust, Swift, JS, & Go, leveraging NEON, AVX2, AVX-512, SVE, GPGPU, & SWAR to accelerate search, hashing, sorting, edit distances, sketches, and memory ops 🦖
Extension for React/Javascript snippets with search supporting ES7+ and babel features
⚡A CLI tool for code structural search, lint and rewriting. Written in Rust
Collection of SIMD-accelerated CLI tools for binary & UTF-8-aware text processing with StringZilla combining ICU Functionality, RipGrep Speeds, & External Memory Scale
Customizable JavaScript and React/Redux snippets for VS Code, with first-class support for ES7+ syntax, React 17–19, React Router v6, Redux Toolkit, and TypeScript.
An official implementation for "CLIP4Clip: An Empirical Study of CLIP for End to End Video Clip Retrieval"
Ivy - a generic completion frontend for Emacs, Swiper - isearch with an overview, and more. Oh, man!
A flexible, performant and reliable search database without the AI bullshit.
Search UI components for React and Vue
Fast Open-Source Search & Clustering engine × for Vectors & Arbitrary Objects × in C++, C, Python, JavaScript, Rust, Java, Objective-C, Swift, C#, GoLang, and Wolfram 🔍
Unified TUI and CLI to index and search your local coding agent session history across 11+ providers (Codex, Claude, Gemini, Cursor, Aider, etc.)
Multi-Modal Database replacing MongoDB, Neo4J, and Elastic with 1 faster ACID solution, with NetworkX and Pandas interfaces, and bindings for C 99, C++ 17, Python 3, Java, GoLang 🗄️

Two-tier hybrid search for Rust: sub-millisecond initial results via potion-128M, quality-refined rankings in 150ms via MiniLM-L6-v2. Combines lexical (Tantivy BM25) and semantic (vector cosine) search with Reciprocal Rank Fusion. Progressive iterator API, f16 SIMD vector index, feature-gated compilation.
Open data sharing powered by Dat [ DEPRECATED - More info on active projects and modules at https://dat-ecosystem.org/ ]
🤖 A client-first, server-capable, fully type-safe router and full-stack framework for the web (React and more).
A fast implementation of Aho-Corasick in Rust.
Bichon – A lightweight, high-performance Rust email archiver with WebUI
PISA: Performant Indexes and Search for Academia
🔎 Impossibly fast web search, made for static sites.
A library of inverted index data structures
A Python Search Engine for Humans 🥸
Qdrant - High-performance, massive-scale Vector Database and Vector Search Engine for the next generation of AI. Also available in the cloud https://cloud.qdrant.io/
An autonomous agent that conducts deep research on any data using any LLM providers
Linux命令大全搜索工具，内容包含Linux命令手册、详解、学习、搜集。https://git.io/linux
